creator: david@ibendit.com
text: The exact same issue that was reported in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=221159 is happening again. Revision https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=484896 removes the Makefile changes that were added in https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/452143 to fix the issue originally, and now the same build issue is back. Manually adding in the Makefile change from the original changeset fixes the issue for me.
